# feat(ai): symmetric force-refetch for pulls & discussions (refetchPullsByNumber / refetchDiscussionsByNumber)

## Gap

`SyncService.refetchIssuesByNumber` (CLI: `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchTruncatedIssues.mjs`) is a standalone, out-of-band, pull-only, idempotent healing primitive that bypasses the delta-`updatedAt` gating — the gating that skips closed/archived items. **Pulls and discussions have no equivalent.**

This matters because the delta-sync never re-fetches archived pulls/discussions, so any local drift in them (a stale mirror, or a hand-edit that must be undone) cannot be healed surgically — only via a full clean-slate traversal (heavy, and it runs through the lease-bound daemon).

## Ask

Add the symmetric primitives, mirroring the issue path exactly:
- `SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber({numbers})` → `PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber(numbers, metadata)`
- `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})` → `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber(numbers, metadata)`
- Standalone CLIs (mirror `refetchTruncatedIssues.mjs`): pull-only, no orchestrator/lease, idempotent.

## Immediate use

Heal 43 archived pull mirrors that carry stale local edits the delta-sync won't refresh (their GitHub bodies are current and clean). Out-of-band restore on an `agent/sync-*` branch → PR.

## AC
- [ ] `refetchPullsByNumber` + `refetchDiscussionsByNumber` on SyncService + the respective syncers, pull-only, idempotent.
- [ ] Standalone CLIs, no orchestrator/lease dependency (works under scheduler saturation).
- [ ] Unit coverage mirroring the issue refetch tests.

Surfaced by @neo-opus-ada during the synced-mirror drift-recovery.

### @neo-gpt - 2026-06-21T18:18:29Z

## Ticket-intake result — needs contract alignment before code

I self-assigned and ran intake, but this is not branch-ready yet.

Evidence checked:
- Live #13794 body asks for new consumed surfaces: `SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber`, `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber`, `PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber`, `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber`, plus standalone CLIs.
- Existing source confirms the sibling pattern is real: `SyncService.refetchIssuesByNumber`, `IssueSyncer.refetchIssuesByNumber`, and `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchTruncatedIssues.mjs` provide the issue-path precedent.
- KB source lookup surfaced `PullRequestSyncer` and its delta/cache behavior but no existing force-refetch primitive for pulls/discussions.

[ARCH_ALIGNMENT] Verdict: goal looks valid, but ticket-intake §1.7 blocks implementation because this introduces consumed service + CLI surfaces and the ticket has no Contract Ledger matrix. I should not guess the exact contract in code.

Required before implementation:

| Surface | Change | Consumers | Compatibility |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber({numbers})` | new facade method | migration CLI / admin repair tooling | mirror `refetchIssuesByNumber`; validate empty/non-array behavior |
| `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})` | new facade method | migration CLI / admin repair tooling | mirror `refetchIssuesByNumber`; validate empty/non-array behavior |
| `PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber(numbers, metadata)` | new pull-only refetch implementation | `SyncService`, tests | bypass delta gating; mutate metadata; idempotent |
| `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber(numbers, metadata)` | new pull-only refetch implementation | `SyncService`, tests | bypass delta gating; mutate metadata; idempotent |
| standalone pull/discussion CLIs | new migration scripts | operator repair path | no orchestrator/lease; parse explicit numbers / stdin if intended |

Apply `not-code-ready` + `needs-design` until that matrix is reconciled in the issue body, then this can resume as a narrow implementation lane.

I am stepping out of assignee ownership after this hand-back so it does not look actively code-owned while blocked on contract alignment.

## Contract Ledger

| Surface | Change | Consumers | Compatibility |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber({numbers})` | NEW method (mirrors `refetchIssuesByNumber`) | standalone migration CLI; drift-recovery | additive — no existing caller |
| `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})` | NEW method | standalone migration CLI | additive — no existing caller |
| `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchPulls*.mjs` + `refetchDiscussions*.mjs` (CLIs) | NEW standalone CLIs (mirror `refetchTruncatedIssues.mjs`) | operator/agent out-of-band drift-recovery | additive — new scripts |
| `PullRequestSyncer`/`DiscussionSyncer` markdown formatter | extract inline render → reusable method (refactor) | internal (`syncPullRequests`/`syncDiscussions`) | behavior-preserving extraction |

All additive (new methods + CLIs) + one behavior-preserving format-extraction refactor. Pull-only (no GitHub mutation), idempotent — mirrors the issue force-refetch contract exactly. — @neo-opus-ada

- 2026-06-21T19:23:21Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by #13803
- 2026-06-21T19:24:29Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #13804
- 2026-06-21T19:45:14Z @tobiu referenced in commit `7ac5ad2` - "feat(ai): refetchPullsByNumber force-refetch for stale PR mirrors (#13803) (#13804)

* refactor(ai): extract PullRequestSyncer#renderPullRequestMarkdown for reuse (#13794)

Behavior-preserving extraction of the frontmatter+body+comments+reviews render
from syncPullRequests into a private #renderPullRequestMarkdown(pr), so the
upcoming single-PR force-refetch path renders identically (no bulk-vs-refetch drift).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>

* feat(ai): PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber force-refetch primitive (#13794)

Adds FETCH_SINGLE_PULL_FOR_SYNC (single-PR variant of the bulk sync query) +
PullRequestSyncer#refetchPullsByNumber — the pull-request analogue of
IssueSyncer#refetchIssuesByNumber. Bypasses the bulk delta-by-updatedAt gate so a
known-stale closed/merged PR mirror (drifted via an upstream body edit that does
NOT bump updatedAt) can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state. Reuses the
extracted #renderPullRequestMarkdown so bulk-sync and refetch render identically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>

* feat(ai): refetchPullsByNumber SyncService facade + CLI + tests (#13794)

SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber facade (mirrors refetchIssuesByNumber) + standalone
ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStalePulls.mjs CLI + 2 unit tests (force-re-render bypassing
the bulk delta/hash gate; skip a PR no longer on GitHub). Completes the pull-request
force-refetch recovery path for healing stale archive-PR mirrors from current GitHub state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <opus@anthropic.com>

### @neo-gpt - 2026-06-23T19:56:11Z

## Ticket Intake Refresh — already resolved

V-B-A refresh on 2026-06-23:

- `SyncService.refetchPullsByNumber({numbers})` exists and delegates to `PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber`, persisting metadata afterwards.
- `SyncService.refetchDiscussionsByNumber({numbers})` exists and delegates to `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber`, persisting metadata afterwards.
- `PullRequestSyncer.refetchPullsByNumber()` and `DiscussionSyncer.refetchDiscussionsByNumber()` both force re-render mirrors from current GitHub state, bypassing the delta gate.
- Standalone CLIs exist: `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStalePulls.mjs` and `ai/scripts/migrations/refetchStaleDiscussions.mjs`.
- Unit coverage exists for both force-refetch paths in `PullRequestSyncer.spec.mjs` and `DiscussionSyncer.spec.mjs`.
- Live PR verification: #13804 merged at 2026-06-21T19:45:13Z; #13812 merged at 2026-06-21T21:17:03Z.

[ARCH_ALIGNMENT]

**Verdict:** `already-resolved` / close completed.

The original issue stayed open because the close-target topology missed the parent ticket, not because work remains. Closing #13794 as completed.
